Session_1_Query_001.query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

Session_1_Query_002.query: I actually went to the CN Tower on my last trip to Toronto. Remove any CN Tower activities. I'd rather do something new.

Session_1_Query_003.query: It's definitely going to rain all day on Day 7. Cancel any outdoor activities, I'll figure out replacements.

Session_2_Query_001.query: The weather forecast shows heavy rain on Day 7. Which activities are outdoors that I might need to reschedule?

Session_3_Query_001.query: My sister and nephew are joining me on Day 6. He's 10 years old. What activities do I already have planned that would be fun for a kid?
top_k_nodes: Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

Session_4_Query_001.query: I'm putting together my expense report. What are the most expensive restaurants I've booked?

Session_5_Query_001.query: I've been stuck in meetings most of the week. Which days have nature activities where I can actually get outside?

Session_6_Query_001.query: I just checked my spending and I'm way over budget. Cut the expensive dinners from the itinerary and I'll find cheaper alternatives later.

Session_7_Query_001.query: It's definitely going to rain all day on Day 7. Cancel any outdoor activities, I'll figure out replacements.

Session_8_Query_001.query: I actually went to the CN Tower on my last trip to Toronto. Remove any CN Tower activities. I'd rather do something new.

Session_9_Query_001.query: Bad news. my friend who was going to host me at Niagara just tested positive for COVID. I need to cancel the Niagara Falls trip.

Session_10_Query_001.query: I'm exhausted. I'm going to take Day 5 as a personal day and skip all the work stuff. Cancel every work-related activity on that day.

Session_11_Query_001.query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

Session_12_Query_001.query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

Session_13_Query_001.query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.
top_k_nodes: Day 10 > Souvenir Stop at Roots or Hudson's Bay Flagship
